1.content:
It was a boring summer day and Jack was busy cleaning his room. The 18 year old was an average boy. Not exactly muscular, but not too skinny, a bit handsome, though sometimes awkward, but definitely a bit of a slob, hence the current state of his room. He'd let it get much too dirty and had decided to be responsible for once and spend the day cleaning the place up.

Down the hall he could hear his older sister, Kasey, arguing with his mother, Tanya, about why she had to stay home on a Saturday to babysit their 3 three year old sister, Allie. Soon their father came into the argument and put his foot down. He heard Kasey's door slam shut as she no doubt ran off to pout. Jack rolled his eyes at his older sister's dramatics as he dug around under his bed. His hand grabbed hold of something and he pulled it out, finding it to be some kind of remote control, though it only had one button.

"I don't remember ever buying this." he muttered to himself as he looked it over. The back read 'FP Inc. Swapper. Just point and press!' Curious, Jack pressed the button. Nothing happened. "Maybe I have to point it at someone... Eh, can't hurt to try, and I need a break from cleaning. Wonder who to try it on, though.."
1.title: The Remote

choices: Say 'No', this is just too freaky
Say 'No', your sister's memories start to flood into your head
11.content:
Kasey, an athletic pear shaped girl of 19 years, had just come home from the local college the day before. She was on scholarship for the soccer team. Her major, Psychology, because she wanted to become a psychologist. Standing 5' 9" Kasey was nearly as tall as Jack, who stood at a respectable 5' 10", with naturally light brown hair that reached down to the bottom of her shoulder blades, fair skin, and green eyes.


Jack Listened to his sister storm off from arguing with their mother. Slamming her bedroom door behind her. Sighing, Jack wished he had it as good as his sister did. The most her and his mom argued about was about living at home or at the dorm on campus. "She is so lucky not to have to live here and have to hear from mom and dad continuously about her grades, dating,friends, and everyday life," thought Jack.


"Well, maybe this thing-a-magig could actually swap us some how so I don't have to hear about it from mom anymore," thought Jack with a smile, even though he didn't actually believe it would work it was still a fun idea to have some fun with it. Walking over to his sister's room he knocked on her door.

"Who is it," snapped his sister.

"It's me,' I responded. 'Can I come in for a second?"


"Fine," she said.

Opening the door and walking into her room, I pointed the clicker at her and pushed the button. A green light flashed quickly through the room and before Jack could take it all back he realized that he was now laying on his sister's bed. Blinking several times he looked around his sister's room only to find it was exactly the same as before, the only difference was that he was laying on her bed and his sister was standing in the doorway.


After a second of blinking, his eye sight readjusted and he looked at his sister in the doorway. What he saw shocked him, she was wearing what he had just been wearing, cargo shorts and a black t-shirt. He saw that he could see her breasts sticking out of the t-shirt without a bra. Making him feel a little akward. But before he could say something his sister spoke up.

"So sis, what do you say?" she asked.

Blinking a could of times, not comprehending what she had just said. Jack looked at her quietly.

"Well, what is it Kasey? Do you want to go to the movies with me and our parents? We are about to leave," she, or was it he, asked.


That is the moment that Jack realized that his own sister just called him 'Kasey' and 'Sis' just then...
11.title: Kasey, his 19 year old sister

choices: You saw the device and escaped.
You freak out and your mom gets worried.
You slowly start acting like Allie
12.content:
He decided that his little sister Allie would be the best choice. He figured that if something did happen she wouldn't be able to explain it and look crazy she'd look like a little girl with a big imagination.
He walked into his sisters room and pressed the button. He felt like he was falling through thin air and when he came back he was wearing his little sister's clothes in her crib while she was in his outside.
She looked at him and walked off to your room just like you would! You freaked out and saw a mirror on the wall and instead of your reflection it was Allie. Your mom walked in and started babying you like she would Allie.
12.title: Allie, his 4 year old sister

choices: Wake up and try to get the remote
Forget you swapped and think this is normal
121.content:
"Allie cat, enough playing its nap time" your mother says as she picks you up, a pile of dolls forgotten in a corner, you spot the remote on one of the higher shelves as she walks you over to Allie's or now your bed. She then shifts you to one hand as she pulls back the blankets and puts you down before covering you and tucking you in. Feeling a wave of tiredness overcome you, you say "Night mommy" in a suprisingly high pitched voice and close your eyes.

Fighting off the tirdness you wait until you hear your mother turn off the light and shut the door. You pull yourself out of bed and with a yawn make toyr way over to the bookshelf housing the remote. "Darn this small body" you say looking up at the shelving unit that towers over you now. You breifly consider climbing it before a quick test shows that wont work, the chair's too heavy and no toy will reach far enough. You give up for the moment, figuring that you can use a broom or get help later.

Making your way over to Allie's mirrior you examin yourself ilmore throughly, your face looks like yours when you were 4 (which granted is very similar to Allies), but your hair was its same light brown compared to Allies dirty blond, a look at the height chart shows you that you're shorter then she was at 26 inches to her 39" a quick check confirms that you are a girl now, and suppressing down a breif flash of panic you realize that you are how you would have been if you were born as the youngest daughter.
With nothing else to reasonably do at the moment you crawl in bed for your nap.
121.title: You saw the device and escaped.

choices: You see Allie in your clothes
1211.content:
Your feet feel cold. This woke you up. You were still in Allie's bed, but your feet were hanging over the edge. You got out of bed to discover that you were back to normal height. Looking at your body, you could see is wsx back to normal. But what bothered you, is how you were dressed. You were dressed in jeans, which seemed normal but your top was definitely girly. It had bell sleeves and a full skirt. Regardless of the style, your clothes fit you perfectly.

You started to feel nervous. You weren't sure what happened.

You saw the remote on a shelf and knew you could easily reach it. But you also saw some dolls on the floor. Instead of going for the remote you decided to pick up a doll instead. It wasn't just any doll, you knew its name was Margaret and it was your favorite. You clutched the doll under your arm and it made you feel safe.

" Margaret," you said to the doll. " This is scary. I should use the remote again."

You are about to reach for the remote when your mother enter the room. " Honey, I'm glad you're up. It's time for lunch."

You continued towards the remote but your mom pulled you away.

" There will be time for that later. Come along, your food is getting cold."

She grabbed you by the arm holding Margaret. As you went with her your thumb instinctively when between your lips and you started sucking.

What happens next?

You ask your parents to go to the bathroom

You were led down to the kitchen and sat at the dinner table. You saw Allie dressed I'm your clothes and she was acting just like you, which you found so bizarre!

Unlike everyone else's meal, yours was already chopped up for you and your drink was presented to you in a pink sippy cup.

You proceeded to eat your lunch until you were hit with a sudden pang - you REALLY needed the toilet, right now! Thankfully you were wearing pullups but should you try and as your parents if you can be excused to go to the bathroom or is it too late?
12112.title: Lunch with the family

choices: Tell Mommy you need a new pull-up
Stay in the slightly wet pull-up
Tell your doll Margeret about your secret
121122.content:
You really needed to go. So you told your mom. You said, Mom, I have to go to the bathroom." This was something you would say, but much like how your reflection was changed, what you mother heard was, "Mommy, need to potty."

"Sure honey," she said.

You got out of your seat. You realized you needed to go even more than you thought. It was like that time in the car when you were stuck in traffic for hours. You really had to go. You ran to the bathroom. You pulled down your pants and then your pull-ups. You didn't even have to think about it, you turned around and sat on the toilet. It was lucky for you that the seat was down or you would have 'fell in'. The pee released immediately. You felt relief as you let it flow.

When you were through, you followed Allie's potty instructions. It was as though you had been drilled in the procedure for months on end. You took some toilet tissue and wiped yourself. You knew 'Always wipe from from to back.' Then you threw the scrap into the toilet and flushed.

It was only after you were done that you notice in your pull-up that you didn't get to the toilet on time. Your pull-up was a little wet. You pulled in into place regardless and then pulled up your jeans. Finally, you washed your hands in the sink. As you turned to leave, you saw you forgot to close the door. You felt embarrassed for forgetting to close the door as well as not making it to the toilet on time.

What happens next?
121122.title: You ask your parents to go to the bathroom

choices: Took a baby bottle from a mini fridge.
122.content:
Mom found the device and picked it up. It had changed into a toy remote as some form of natural disguise so mom did not think it out of place. "A new toy Jack gave you dear?" Curious, she asked you.

You nodded, smiling, and reached out for the device. Mom smiled but placed it onto a shelf way beyond your reach. Your hopes crashed as mom then easily lifted you out of the crib. To her, you were and had always been Allie. She placed you down onto a changing table where she began to secure a number of straps, keeping you in place. You opened your mouth to protest but mom shoved a pacifier into your mouth and tied it in place.

"I know you hate being treated like a baby, dear." Gently, she told you. "Still, this is the best solution. Your body is very weak and nothing we try is making it any stronger. Also, your stomach can't digest anything other than very soft foods like baby formula or applesauce."

"That's right." Worried, you thought. "Allie has what the doctors call 'the baby disease'. It leaves the body as fragile as a newborn baby. What was I thinking when I switched roles with her!?"

You began to cry through the pacifier, causing mom to give you a pained look. "We will skip the physical therapy for today and focus on having a little fun, okay?"

"I'd like to get that device back." Sighing, you thought.

Mom smiled patiently then began to change your diaper. Having the mind of an eighteen year old boy, it was the most humiliating experience. Worse, you could not alert mom of who you really were with that pacifier gagging you.

Once you were sealed into a fresh diaper, mom undid the straps then...
122.title: Trapped as your 'baby' sister.

choices: do some more swapping with his family
124.content:
he decided to stay calm and acted like Allie until his mother left him alone he then noticed the device on Allies pillow and picked it up he then noticed a compartment on the back which had a dial and 4 settings:
-complete swap
-life and clothes
-body swap
-reset swap
this should make things more interesting he thought to himself, he then set the dial to reset and he then pressed the button and he then turned back into himself in his room he then looked around and he found his mother he changed the dial to clothes and life and then swapped her with Allie he looked back at where his mother once was and he saw Allie wearing his mothers clothes and he then looked in Allies room to find his mother in Allies clothes in the crib
124.title: You stay calm about this.

125.content:
You looked around the room. It was clearly Allie's room and you were in Allie's bed. Everything was just so girlie. You could see all of Allie's stuff. Then you looked at yourself, you hadn't changed but you were wearing Allie's clothing. The apparel had resized itself to fit your much larger frame, but the style screamed little girl. You wanted to see what you looked like, so you got out of bed and headed towards the mirror. To your surprise, you didn't see yourself dressed in Allie's clothes. You saw Allie dressed normally. You moved your hand to make sure the reflection was yours. Then you looked at yourself again, you could see your real body.

Next you walked over to the closet to see your clothes. They were outfits you had seen on Allie, but they were definitely big enough to fit you.

"If everyone sees me as Allie, I think I'll play along for a little while. I'll swap back a little later. What should I do first?"

You saw one of Allie's dolls on the bed. It was her favorite. You picked it up and pretended to play with it. You thought, "Hey what do you think the real Allie is doing?" Then it hit you. She is just a little girl. She doesn't know anything about being me. She'll make everyone think that I'm retarded."

In the other room, your mother was amazed. "With any of the things he could have done with the device, he swapped lives with Allie? Why would he do that? Well, if Jack wants to be a little girl. I'll indulge him."

Jack didn't know that it was his mother that left the device in his room for him to find. The device would work on anyone else but her. Now that Jack activated the thing, she was going to make sure he was going to get the full benefit of being someone else. In this case, of being Allie, a four-year-old girl who is still in pull-ups.

Jack ran out of Allie's room. He had to swap back with Allie before it's too late. Even if it was 'too late' he would have to minimize the damage.

When he turned the corner he ran into mom.

"Sweetheart, where are you going in such a hurry?" Mom asked.

"I am looking for All, I mean Jack."

"Jack isn't here. He left to see his friends."

"What???"

"You can see him later. But now let's get you dressed."

"I have to find him!"

"Not without shoes."

Before Jack knew it, Mom took the remote out of his hand and pulled him by the wrist back toward Allie's room. Jack pulled as hard as he could, but he couldn't get away from Mom. Like his reflection looked like Allie, his strength seemed to feel like Allie's.

Jack refused to go, until Mom gave him a hard swat on his backside. It was much more painful than he thought it should have been. Cowed, Jack walked where mom directed. he had to get the remote returned and swap back with Allie as soon as possible. he had no way of knowing that mom knew all about the remote and she would make sure he didn't get it. Not that she wouldn't dangle it in front of him so he thought he had a chance.
125.title: You slowly start acting like Allie

choices: It's not going well for the real Allie
Select something pretty for Jack to wear
Sign Jack up for dance lessons
1251.content:
"OK, sweetheart. Let's get you dressed for your day."

Jack didn't know what to say. He needed the remote, He would have to play along until he got it. There wasn't any use trying to tell mom what had happened. She wouldn't believe him. Jack could hardly believe it himself, how could he convince mom. Not when the remote could change things like his appearance in a mirror, or alter all his clothes, or give mom enough strength to treat him like he was a little four-year-old.

If he did something that Allie wouldn't do, Jack didn't know what would happen. He was sure that the remote would make sure that what happened wasn't good. The best thing he could do was to act the part until he could get back to normal. If he found out that Allie was screwing up his life, he might have to change his mind. But until then, it was best to not cause waves.

Back in Allie's room, mom helped Jack out of the clothes he was wearing. Soon, Jack was completely naked except for the Disney Princesses pull-up he was wearing. Jack looked down to make sure he still had his penis under the diaper. He was pretty sure it would be there, but he checked just to be sure. The rest of his body looked normal too.

Mom looked in the closet for something to dress Jack in. But that wasn't what she was thinking about. She was making a list in her head of the things that she would make sure Jack experienced the full range of being a little girl. Certainly, she would dress him in lots of dressed and apparel as far from what he used to wear as possible. She would make sure he experienced being bathed by his mother. He would spend lots of time learning potty training. He would experience lots of coloring books and childish videos. He would spend lots of time on playdates.

Mom would have to write down a complete list later and make sure that Jack didn't miss out on any of these activities. She would keep him in line by making Jack think he could get back the remote, but she would be crafty and keep the remote just out of reach.
1251.title: Change clothing

choices: Maybe some clothes for a younger girl would be cuter?
12512.content:
Jack's mother carefully compiled the cutest outfit for Jack that was available in the wardrobe. It consisted of a yellow sundress with a little bow on the hip (https://c.shld.net/rpx/i/s/pi/mp/22057/p...), white socks with a frilly trim and black mary janes.

Jack looked over the items his mother had laid in front of him on the bed, a little panicked that he might soon be wearing these feminine items.

"Come on honey, let's get you dressed!" Jack's mother said, picking up the dress and holding it above Jack's head.

Jack hesitated putting his arms up, he was about to wear his little sisters dress! This was crazy, what was he thinking swapping with Allie?... Although, it dors look cute, he thought, not noticing that his mind was slowly adapting.

"Are you going to put your arms up Allie or are you going to just walk around in your pull-up like a baby today?" This gave jack's mother an idea, she remembered the box of Allie's baby clothes in the attic, perhaps the remote had made it that Jack could fit into them... Well, she could keep that one up her sleeve just in case.

Jack blushed and quickly out his arms up. His mother smiled and dropped the dress down over him and got Jack to sit down on the bed while she put his socks and shoes on.
Finally she finished off by putting an Alice style headband on him.

Jack walked over to the mirror, very aware of the sensation of the swish of the dress around his legs, and the odd sight he saw when he looked down at himself. But when he looked in the mirror he saw his cute for year old sister looking back at him and he couldn't help but smile.

Jack's mother admired her handiwork... did she feel as though this outfit was cute enough, or does she experiment with Allie's old baby clothes too?
12512.title: Select something pretty for Jack to wear

choices: Mom takes you to sign up for girl scouts/dance class.
Mom takes you to get your hair styled
125121.content:
"My don't we look pretty," mom enthused.

You thought you looked ridiculous, but there wasn't anything you could do about it.

"I think we should take a picture," mom continued. "Stand over there."

"Smile!" You did so and mom took a picture on her phone.

"Let's get another one...smile again...Got it."

"Now, we will be out for a while. Do you need to go potty?"

"No, Mom...Mommy."

"Well let's find out."

"I don't need to go."

"Couldn't hurt to check." Mom put out her hand. You didn't take it though.

"I said, let's try and potty now," mom said with a little bit of force in her voice.

You didn't want to upset mom even more. You were also worried she would swat your backside again. You followed mom to the bathroom. Inside you saw Allie's potty. You looked up expecting mom to leave, but it was clear she was going to stay. You reached under your skirt and pulled down your pull-ups. For a moment you thought to just stand in front of the potty but realized you couldn't do that. You sat down. After a few moments, you said, "See I don't have to."

"Let's just wait a little while," Mom suggested.

Then she turned on the water to 'help you along.' This didn't work as you didn't need to potty.

"I can't."

"Let's just wait until you do. It's going to be a long trip. It'd be better if you got it all done now.

She stared at you for over seven minutes. It might have been a 'short' period of time, but it seemed like hours with her staring at you. During that time, your attitude changed from 'I don't need to go' to 'let me try and get this over with.' Mom could actually see you were trying.

Satisfied that you couldn't go, Mom let you give up. Mom used the time while you were trying to decide what would be the next little girl experience you should try.

Where do you go next?
125121.title: This outfit is perfect

choices: Jack appears as a little girl to the receptionist
The receptionist sees Jack as a boy in little girl's clothing
Jack frantically tries to get the remote from his mother's bag
1251213.content:
Jack was relived that ordeal was over and stood up from the potty, pulling up his pull-ups back into position beneath his dress.

"Ok then honey," Jack's mother said, "well let's going going then"

"Where are we going mommy?" jack replied, starting to feel a bit worried about going outside... What if people out there can see that he's not really a little girl?

"I'm taking you to daycare of course!" She replied. She was very excited about this, daycare should give Jack a good look at life as a little girl.

"Daycare? Oh... But mommy, I wasn't to stay with you" Jack whined, starting to feel more and more anxious by the minute.

Jack's mother found this all adorable. "It'll be fine honey, you'll love it when you're there. Trust me" she said with a smile, then gently took Jack's hand and led him to the front door. She put Allie's pink, Barbie themed backpack on Jack and led him outside.

Jack looked left and right on the way to the car, there were a couple of people walking down the street but he couldn't tell if they'd even seen him, never mind if they noticed anything odd about him.

Jack instinctively made his way to the front passenger door of the car, and started to get in when his mother spoke up, " Allie, you're not old enough to sit in the front seat, come here and I'll buckle you in the back"

Jack blushed. Of course, he thought, I'm only four years old now...

His mother buckled him in to a child's seat, which was now large enough to accommodate him. Once he was all secured in Jack's mother got in the driver's seat and they were underway.

Jack's mother continued to give Jack the little girl experience and put some nursery rhymes on the car stereo, which she expected Jack to sing along to. Apprehensively Jack started singing, by the time they reached daycare Jack was fully in the mood, singing along and bouncing in his seat.

When the engine was turned off and the music stopped, Jack realised what he'd been doing. What on earth is wrong with me? I really got carried away there... I need that remote back.

Jack's mother came and released him from his seat. While she was absent down he thought he saw the remote in her handbag. He started to reach for it but his mother adjusted the bag and put it out of reach.

Jack was led into the daycare building, suddenly forgetting about the remote as his fears about being seen as a bit in girl's clothing rematerialized.

As they approach the front counter does Jack's fears come true and the receptionist notices that Jack is actually a boy, or does she see Jack as four-year-old Allie?
1251213.title: Mom takes you to daycare.

choices: You make a picture and give it to Laine
Laine encourages you to draw with another little girl
You tell Laine you think she is 'hot' by accident
You wont let Laine help the other daycare students
12512131.content:
One of the daycare attendants came out and brought Allie into the daycare play area. There were many children there as well as toys for them to play with. You hadn't any interest in doing anything. You simply wanted to be left alone while he planned how to return to normal.

Another attendant saw you sitting alone and come over. She wanted all the kids to feel comfortable.

"Hello," the attendant said quietly. "I'm Laine. What is your name?"

"I'm J---Allie."

"That's a pretty name."

"Thank you."

"And look at your dress. It's so pretty."

You smiled.

"In fact, you are also a very pretty girl." Then in quiet confidential tones, Laine said. "You know what. I think you are one of the prettiest girls here."

You liked Laine. You think she was pretty. She was more than pretty, You thought that Laine was hot. In other circumstances, you would have asked her out. You liked spending time with her. You decided to ask Laine a bunch of questions about herself. Maybe after all this was over, you might ask Laine out.

Before you could ask your first question, Laine asked you, "Do you like coloring books?"

You didn't want to seem negative so you nodded your head.

"We have all sorts of books, what type do you like."

"Ummm all types."

"How about coloring books with farm animals?"

"I guess so."

"Great, let me get you some. I'll bet you can make really great pictures."

Laine left to find the books.
12512131.title: Jack appears as a little girl to the receptionist

choices: You suddenly realise you're desperate to pee
125121312.content:
Laine returned with a colouring book containing line drawings of zoo animals, but that wasn't the only thing she returned with.

"Allie, I'd like you to meet Sarah," another little girl was hiding behind Laine's legs, she gave you a shy little wave and ducked back behind Laine.
"Sarah's new here and I was hoping you'd be able to keep her company, maybe the two of you could become friends!"

You did not want to make friends with a four-year-old. From your perspective you were almost twenty years old! Admittedly you were sitting in a daycare wearing a child's dress and pull-ups, but that was against the point...

Without you responding Laine sat Sarah down on the floor next to you and left you both with colouring books.
"Have fun you two! I'll get you both some juice, I'll be back soon!"

Great, you thought. You flipped through the colouring book, trying to find a page that hadn't already been used until you came across a page depicting an African savannah, filled with giraffes, lions and zebras.

You looked around you for the colours you'd need when you noticed Sarah, she was just staring at her colouring book and looked so sad. As much as you didn't want to be here, you felt really bad for this little girl.

"Hey, sarah right?" Sarah looked up at you, a little surprised at the sudden conversation and nodded, "what are you drawing over there?" You feigned interested and shuffled over to her, your pull-up crinkling as you went... You blushed a little at that.

"I'm colouring a pony," Sarah said, presenting a barely started image, "we used to live next to a field of them.. but now we live here, I don't see them anymore"

The girl was clearly homesick, you felt even worse for her now. You decided there and then that your mission was to cheer this girl up!
You delved onto your inner little girl and talked about how much you also loved ponies, you talked about your favorite dolls and asked her what her favorite toys were.

By the time Laine returned with the drinks, you and Sarah were getting along very well, you'd even managed to get her to smile a few times!

"Well, this is lovely to see, looks like the two of you are getting along well!" Laine said, handing you both your sippy cups of juice. She affectionately patted you on the head and whispered you you, "thanks little one" with a wink before she wandered off to the other kids.

You'd gotten so into trying to cheer Sarah up that you'd lost yourself in the moment again. It had actually been quite relaxing sinking into the role of a little girl in order to interact with Sarah on her level.
You looked down at the childish cup on your hands, it was light pink and had images of disney princesses all around it.
You slowly raised it to your lips and drank the apple juice from it. You actually enjoyed and embraced the experience of sitting there on the floor, dressed and acting as a little girl would, enjoying her juice.

What happens next?
125121312.title: Laine encourages you to draw with another littl...

choices: You decided it would be best not to 'make waves'
Another boy pulled down your pull-up
1251213123.content:
After coloring for a little while, you had to adjust your seating to find a more comfortable position. As you were stretching out your legs, a little boy who was playing tag and not paying attention to where he was going tripped over you. He went flying.

"Hey, look where you are going!" the boy demanded.

You start to stand up after the accident. Not used to wearing a skirt and not caring anyway, you exposed your pull-up to everyone as you stood.

You were much taller than the little boy and was going to tell him off when he saw your pull-up and said, "Look at the little baby! She is still in diapers."

Reflexively you said, "I'm not a baby."

"Yes, you are. You still wear diapers. I have been wearing big boy underpants for a long time," he stated. Being four and not knowing the concepts of weeks and months, he thought he had been out of diapers for a long time. The truth was that he had been wearing boys briefs for over a little over a month. But he still thought he was such a big boy as compared with you. Not only were you in diapers, but you were also a girl which somehow made you seem more babyish to him.

You were about to pick the little boy up when...
1251213123.title: Trouble with boys

choices: Laine punishes all three of you
12512131232.content:
Despite this boy just being a small child, you found yourself starting to well up with tears. Why is this bothering me so much? I'm not really a little girl, and I shouldn't care what this boy thinks!

Just as you were about to start crying, Sarah appeared by your side, "leave her alone you big bully. Allie is not a baby!" Sarah gave the boy a shove and he fell backwards.
He landed awkwardly on his arm, grazing it on the carpet. He looked at the girls and then started crying.

"Who's the baby now?" Sarah said, sticking her tongue out at the boy.

It was at that moment that Laine appeared on the scene, how does she react?
12512131232.title: Sarah came to your defense

choices: For you to be invited to a little girl birthday party
For you to be invited to a playdate
For a sleepover at your house
125121312321.content:
The humiliated boy was about to get up and charge Sarah. But before he could do anything, Laine grabbed him by the arm and took him into another room to discipline the boy. You thought it was all over. Sarah gave you a big hug to make sure you were alright. Soon the entire group of students was brought together for a group activity. They were going to be lead in a group sing.

By the time the singing was over, two boys positioned themselves behind you. "You got Tommy into trouble," one of the boys said. "We hate you!" The boys weren't any threat to you. You were twice their size and four times their weight.
